title: CCBB congenital CMV cohort immune cell subset RNA seq analysis
author: Semmes, Eleanor
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
CCBB congenital CMV cohort immune cell subset RNA seq analysis includes: 

 1) metadata file with sample cell type and CMV infection status 

 2) read counts for FAC-sorted cord blood immune cell subsets 

 3) sample code for bulk RNA seq analysis and data visualization
